commands.summary: Final production_ready closeout rerun passed for RP00.P01.M01.S01 with ProductContract model checks, actual Claude metadata, construction inspection, and closeout evidence.
Final production_ready closeout rerun passed with 227 requirements.
Final production_ready closeout rerun passed with 9 modules, 9 principles, and 7 invariants.
Final production_ready closeout rerun passed with 3,300 source micro phases and 54,355 implementation subphases.
Final production_ready closeout rerun passed with 3,300 micro phases, 30 release programs, 10 standard phases, and 11 micro phases per standard phase.
Final production_ready closeout rerun passed for all goals with claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only.
Final production_ready closeout rerun passed 32/32 tests, including ProductContract model tests.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains non-delegable for sensitive actions.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, bank, tax identifier, credential, secret, production export, or customer-support attachment data was used.
RP00.P01.M01.S01 ProductContract model is no-real-data and writes_product_state=false.
Weighted-ledger generic title/deliverable_type/UI gates are explicitly deferred as generator-profile alignment evidence and are not hand-edited in this ProductContract model slice.
This subphase does not implement AIControlRule, HermesGate, ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, BlockedClaim, close RP00.P01, close RP00, replace H00/C00 review, or replace human approval.
Actual Claude C00 review, adjudication, construction inspection, and final validation rerun are recorded before production_ready.
